title: lyonia rubiginosa var. stahlii
intro: Lyonia rubiginosa var. stahlii, also known as Stahli's Lyonia or Mountain Huckleberry, is a rare and endangered shrub native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lyonia rubiginosa var. stahlii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
